firstLookSummaries.author: reviewer
firstLookSummaries.body: Overall the approach is good but there are a few things to clean up before merging.

instructions: Review the bodies shown under `## Review summaries (first look)` — you are seeing these for the first time. Eligible non-human IDs, when present, are already included in `--minimize-comment-ids` in the resolve or resolve-only command above; if any warrants a Shepherd Journal note, append it before running resolve.
Stop this iteration — if you pushed new commits, CI needs time before the next tick; otherwise stop before the next tick. Recheck: rerun `pr-shepherd 42` to recheck once after a fresh 30s–4m delay.
